objective: Plan the two-failure-domain continuity proof over the M2 membership, writer, fence, recovery, checkpoint, and removal families.
falsifiable_claim: One System identity, constitution, ownership set, and finality profile survive declared faults without dual accepted effects, while measured recovery and lost suffix remain explicit.
exit_criteria: Two declared failure domains preserve one System identity, constitution, owners, and finality profile with no dual accepted effects.
RPO, RTO, and lost suffix are measured and drain, removal, restart, and reconstruction pass under declared faults.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M10_TWO_FAILURE_DOMAIN_CONTINUITY_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Inject writer, node, link, storage, witness, restart, delayed-message, stale-epoch, incomplete-catch-up, drain, removal, and ambiguous-suffix faults.
remaining_nonclaims: Promotion remains operator-controlled unless separately proven.
No useful distribution, consensus, authority expansion, federation, or stage closure claim.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
